admin.title: Administrative Steps
admin.subtitle: Complete your essential steps
admin.congrats: Congratulations! All your steps are completed!

nas.title: Social Insurance Number (SIN)
nas.description: Must be done within the first 3 days. Visit Service Canada.

ramq.title: Health Insurance Card (RAMQ)
ramq.description: 3-month waiting period. Register as soon as you arrive.

bank.title: Bank Account
bank.description: Open an account at a Canadian bank (TD, RBC, Desjardins...)

license.title: Driver's License
license.description: Exchange your foreign license at SAAQ within 6 months.

housing.title: Housing
housing.description: Check Kijiji, LesPAC or contact a real estate agent.
